narrative:
Coolville Village (precinct in Athens County) has 315 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.7 percentage points.
